pages.text: A wall is planned, then built

&6Wall Building&r unlocks two things: the wall planner that lays out a line of defense along your borders, and the &6Builder&r worker whose trade is to raise it, piece by piece, against whatever comes.

You design the wall first, then builders place it verbatim from that blueprint. Walls come in powers-of-two pieces, hug uneven terrain, and leave deep-water gaps; gates let your own citizens through while keeping threats out.
Walls are real stakes, not decoration. They interact with your population cap, settlement safety, and raid pressure, and a demolished section refunds material so a layout can adapt over time.
